news.headline: Belgium thrash USA 5-2; Mexico vs Portugal ends 0-0 in football friendlies
news.summary: A man died after falling from the stands at Azteca Stadium, where Mexico hosted Portugal with Ronaldo missing the match.

news.headline: North Korea’s Kim Jong Un oversees test of high-thrust engine: state media
news.summary:
<p>North Korean leader Kim Jong Un oversaw the ground test of an upgraded rocket engine, state media reported on Sunday, marking another key step in its weapons programme.</p>
